title: Defibrillator
description: A server utility mod for messing with NBT
body:
Defibrillator is a server utility for fabric that allows you to modify various data that requires Fabric Language Kotlin

---

Supported data types:
- Player data
- Player advancements
- Block entity data
- Held item data
- Entity data
- And more to come

The command requires OP and editing does not work from the server console

---

The config also allows for enabling "freezes", essentially if things are causing a crash on tick, you can instead catch that crash and prevent the entity from ticking for a certain amount of time

---

### THIS MOD BE UNSTABLE! REPORT ALL ERRORS EVEN IF THEY DON'T CRASH THE GAME
